paper_title: Facies and Depositional Model Analysis of Pleistocene Carbonate Bodies

methods.description: A detailed sedimentological and stratigraphic study of the Pleistocene fan-shaped carbonate bodies at Porto Miggiano to understand their facies, 3D anatomy, and internal architecture.

steps.description: Mapped lithosomes on orthophotographs document the spatial position and relationships between the sedimentary bodies.
steps.searchable_summary: map lithosomes on orthophotographs to document spatial positions

steps.description: Facies and bounding surfaces were mapped by line drawings onto photomosaics of the sea cliff.
steps.searchable_summary: map facies and bounding surfaces on photomosaics

steps.description: Compositional and textural analysis is based on 75 thin sections.
steps.searchable_summary: perform compositional and textural analysis on thin sections

steps.description: Taphonomic description of benthic foraminifera is based on the Beavington-Penney Taphonomic Scale (BPTS).
steps.searchable_summary: describe taphonomy of benthic foraminifera using BPTS

methods.description: A detailed facies analysis based on composition, texture, geometries, and sedimentary structures to distinguish seven facies from A to G.

steps.description: Perform detailed facies analysis based on composition, texture, geometries, and sedimentary structures.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze facies based on composition, texture, and structures

methods.description: Construction of a depositional model to understand the shape, position, and internal architecture of carbonate bodies, and the processes leading to their formation.

steps.description: Analyze the shape and position of studied bodies and their internal architecture.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze shape and internal architecture of carbonate bodies

steps.description: Interpret the occurrence of dense planar lamination and interlayered laminae and backset beds.
Partition studied bodies into three depositional zones: proximal, intermediate, and distal.
steps.searchable_summary: partition carbonate bodies into depositional zones
